articles.title: 6 F1 drivers who starred in other racing series
articles.summary: 6 F1 drivers who starred in other racing series. As Max Verstappen prepares for his Nurburgring 24 Hours debut later this season, F1.com looks back at the drivers who enjoyed successful outings in other racing series whilst still active in Formula 1.

articles.title: Fisichella reacts to Antonelli’s F1 breakthrough
articles.summary: Fisichella reacts to Antonelli’s F1 breakthrough. One week ago, Mercedes protégé Kimi Antonelli ended an Italian motorsport drought as he became the first driver from the country to win a Formula 1 race in almost two decades.

articles.title: Development opportunities, not compression ratio changes will help Ferrari close the gap - Vasseur
articles.summary: Development opportunities, not compression ratio changes will help Ferrari close the gap - Vasseur. The Additional Development and Upgrade Opportunities (ADUO) will be a bigger factor in Ferrari finding engine performance, not changes to compression ratio tests, says Fred Vasseur.

articles.title: Stroll addresses speculation about Newey’s role after Wheatley’s Audi departure
articles.summary: Stroll addresses speculation about Newey’s role after Wheatley’s Audi departure. Aston Martin executive chairman Lawrence Stroll says Adrian Newey’s role within the Formula 1 team is designed to allow him to excel, amid speculation that he will relinquish his team principal title.

articles.title: Wheatley leaves Audi, tipped for Aston Martin move
articles.summary: Wheatley leaves Audi, tipped for Aston Martin move. Jonathan Wheatley has left his position as Audi team principal with immediate effect “due to personal reasons,” having been linked with the same role at Aston Martin.
